---
name: Test Request
about: Request new or improved test coverage
title: "Test Needed: "
labels: test, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Coverage Gap

Describe what behavior is not covered.

## Test Type

Describe whether this needs unit tests, regression tests, property-style checks, integration tests, or coverage updates.

## Expected Assertions

Describe what the tests should validate.

## Additional Context

Add related issues, bug reports, examples, or edge cases.
